HGSS.338.0000:
A thief broke into the Power Plant...
What is the world coming to?
HGSS.338.0001:
I just got word from Cerulean.
It appears that a shady character has\r
been loitering around.\f
HGSS.338.0002:
Could I ask for your cooperation?\f
The shady character was hanging around
the Cerulean Gym...\f
HGSS.338.0003:
Could I ask for your cooperation?\f
The shady character was hanging around
the Cerulean Gym...
HGSS.338.0004:
Someone made off with a part that’s
essential for the generator.\f
Without it, the new generator’s
useless!
HGSS.338.0005:
This Power Plant had been abandoned in
the past.\f
We got it back up and running to provide
power to the Magnet Train.
HGSS.338.0006:
The Power Plant’s Manager is up ahead.\f
But since someone wrecked the
generator, he’s been both sad and,\r
at times, furious...\f
Sometimes he would burst out laughing
out of desperation.\r
We’ve had to go through so much...
HGSS.338.0007:
The Magnet Train consumes a lot
of electricity.\f
It can’t move if the new generator
isn’t operating.
HGSS.338.0008:
I collect Pokémon.
Do you have a DUGTRIO?\f
Want to trade it for my MAGNETON? [0200,0000]
HGSS.338.0009:
Yay! I got myself a DUGTRIO!
Thanks!
HGSS.338.0010:
Huh? That’s not DUGTRIO.
What a letdown...
HGSS.338.0011: You don’t want to trade? Aww...
HGSS.338.0012: Hi, how’s my old MAGNETON doing?
HGSS.338.0013:
Manager: I-I-I’m ready to blast
something!\f
Who would dare steal a part from the
generator?\f
I spent so much time fixing it!
If I catch him, he’s going to see\r
what I can do with my Charge Beam!
HGSS.338.0014:
Manager: Ah! Yeah!
The thing you have...\f
Is that the part that was stolen from
my beloved generator?\f
You found it?
Thank you so much!\f
Now, all I have to do is...
attach this part here...\f
HGSS.338.0015:
Manager: Whirrrrrr!\f
Yes, it’s running!
Whirrr, whirrr!\f
HGSS.338.0016:
Manager: Wahah! Thanks!\f
Here! Go ahead and take this TM
as a reward!\f
HGSS.338.0017:
Manager: TM57 is my Charge Beam!\f
It will shoot beams, and it can also
sometimes raise Special Attack!
HGSS.338.0018:
Staff Mottos:\f
1. Electricity is not infinite.
2. Conserve wherever possible.\r
3. Watch out for each other.\r
4. Idle hands are not allowed.\r
5. Wear shoes with rubber soles.\r
6. The Manager is awesome.
HGSS.338.0019:
Use electricity wisely
for a bright and pleasant life.\r
           Kanto Power Plant
